reviews.review_description: I am using a Galaxy S7 Edge on Oreo.
I thought it would be a bit more fun than just falling down a chimney.  It dosent work very well. Terrible control. Huge waste of money

This app would install and run properly on my old S7, but won't install on my S10.  Basically, this is a clone of "Aaaaaaa!," where you control your fall and hit targets while avoiding obstacles.  I'll raise this review is the author(s) fix it for current phones.

Edit:  nope, NOT "fixed."  Give it another try, please!

developer_response.body: Apologies. This has been fixed now!

reviews.review_description: Took me forever to figure out how to control it. Game is easier to control standing but you get dizzy quick. It needs controller support
I just paid to fall down a chimney?

developer_response.body: As an infinite runner style game, have you tried to beat your last score? It gets more challenging the further and faster you fall!

reviews.review_title: Won't even install on my Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: Tried several times. Even tried turning my Go off and on again. It just sits in my Not Installed folder. It downloads, says Installing for about 2 seconds and then nothing happens. But judging by the reviews, I don't think I'm missing out on much. Merry Christmas!

developer_response.body: Hope you still have a good Christmas! I fixed the issue today in the settings, there was a clash in the device support.
Apologies! It should be fixed now.
